div.h2: Column Projection: SELECT col2, col4 FROM t
div.p: Header parsed linearly to compute offsets; non-projected value bytes are never read.

g.text: Step 2 — Scan Serial Types for col2 (col_idx=2)
Step 3 — Scan Serial Types for col4 (col_idx=4)
header scan | O(col_idx) | parse varints 0..col_idx only
value decode | O(1) | single read at computed offset
allocations | O(projected) | only for TEXT/BLOB outputs
skipped cols | 0 bytes read | value bytes never touched
full decode | O(n) + O(n) mem | all serial types + all values
SELECT 2/5 cols | ~2.5x fewer allocs | 3 value regions untouched
Gray box | SKIPPED — serial type parsed, value bytes ignored
Green box | PROJECTED — value bytes read and decoded into dest
Blue step | Algorithm step inside record_read_column()
value_off | Running sum of skipped column sizes in header scan
record ptr + col_idx passed to record_read_column()
